name: Divine Domain feature

compilation_state.summary: Generated from Cleric level 17 feature data.

description: At 17th level, you gain a feature from your chosen Divine Domain. Your domain grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level. It also grants you additional ways to use Channel Divinity when you gain that feature at 2nd level, and additional benefits at 6th, 8th, and 17th levels.
